message.content:
PASS  
Description: The page is a personalized dashboard for a candidate (Kadiatou Konaté) with a green header displaying "EdukaFlow" and a search bar. The left sidebar has "CANDIDAT" highlighted, with "Tableau de bord" (dashboard) and "Candidatures" (applications) options. The main content starts with a heading "Bonjour, Kadiatou ! Voici l'activité du jour" (Hello, Kadiatou! Here’s today’s activity) and a date/status line. A "Mon dossier" (My file) card includes an avatar with "KK", a status badge "En attente" (Pending), dossier ID "CAND-2024-048", submission date, and a "Voir le détail" (View details) button. Below, 4 stat pills show "Filière: BTS SIO", "Niveau: 1ère année", "Pièces fournies: 4/4", and "Complétude IA: 100%". An amber "Synthèse d'analyse IA" (AI analysis summary) card contains text about the dossier being complete, a good baccalaureate grade, a coherent motivation letter, and no detected issues. No global KPIs, charts, or n8n card are present. All checks are satisfied.
